description: The Clan Moccia is the oldest and most powerful Camorra organization operating in the lower Liburia area, particularly in the municipalities of Afragola, Casoria, Arzano, Caivano and nearby, north and northeast of Naples. Founded by Gennaro Moccia in the 1960s, it was later led by his wife Anna Mazza, the first woman in Italy to face criminal proceedings for mafia crimes. The clan has a strong presence also in the Lazio region and is structured as a confederation of local criminal groups with a pyramidal hierarchy.
